zh.Ossory, IRLANDE: 愛爾蘭迪 本 奧索利
zh.Glamis Castle, Forfarshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭Forfarshire格拉米斯 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY於0962年1月6日出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 奧索利時，她的父親Donnchad I Mael-na-Mbo Ri na Hy Kinsale D'OSSORY32歲，母親Aife Aoife ingen Gillapatraic D'IRLANDE27歲。她於大約0979年與Cornan Abbot在英國蘇格蘭結婚。她去世於1023年在蘇格蘭Forfarshire格拉米斯 卡素享年61歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭奧可尼。

zh-hans.Ossory, IRLANDE: 爱尔兰迪 本 奧索利
zh-hans.Glamis Castle, Forfarshire, Scotland: 苏格兰Forfarshire格拉米斯 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY于0962年1月6日出生在爱尔兰迪 本 奧索利时，她的父亲Donnchad I Mael-na-Mbo Ri na Hy Kinsale D'OSSORY32岁，母亲Aife Aoife ingen Gillapatraic D'IRLANDE27岁。她于大约0979年与Cornan Abbot在英国苏格兰结婚。她去世于1023年在苏格兰Forfarshire格拉米斯 卡素享年61岁，埋葬在苏格兰奧可尼。

nameMeanings.name: d'OSSORY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dosser
meanings: German: nickname for a loud person, from an agent derivative of Old High German dozzen ‘to bluster or thunder’.

Austrian (Tyrol) and Swiss German: topographic name for someone living on a ridge, from Ladin dos (from Latin dorsum ‘ridge’, literally ‘back’), + the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant. Compare Doss 3.
English: nickname from an agent derivative of Middle English dossen ‘to push with the horns, butt, toss, gore’, perhaps denoting a bellicose man.

nameMeanings.name: ou
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Louis   or, less commonly,   Louise .

variants.name: Louisa
meanings: feminine form of   Louis  , commonly used as an English given name since the 18th century.

variants.name: Louise
meanings: feminine form of Louis , introduced to England in the 17th century. Like Louisa , it has remained perennially popular and is currently frequently used as a component of compound names such as Ella-Louise, Sophie-Louise, and Tia-Louise.

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

nameMeanings.name: Édith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Desmond
meanings: Transferred use of an Irish surname derived from the Gaelic byname Deasmhumhnach ‘(man from) south Munster’, an ancient Irish kingdom named after Mumhu, one of its early kings.

en.lifeSummary: When Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY was born on 6 January 0962, in Diocese of Ossory, Ireland, her father, Donnchad I Mael-na-Mbo Ri na Hy Kinsale D'OSSORY, was 32 and her mother, Aife Aoife ingen Gillapatraic D'IRLANDE, was 27. She married Cornan Abbot about 0979, in Scotland, United Kingdom. She died in 1023, in Glamis Castle, Forfarshire, Scotland, at the age of 61, and was buried in Orkney, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY est née le 6 janvier 0962, à Diocese of Ossory, Irlande, son père, Donnchad I Mael-na-Mbo Ri na Hy Kinsale D'OSSORY, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Aife Aoife ingen Gillapatraic D'IRLANDE, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Cornan Abbot environ 0979, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1023, à Glamis Castle, Forfarshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Orkney, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY am 6. Januar 0962 in Diocese of Ossory, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Donnchad I Mael-na-Mbo Ri na Hy Kinsale D'OSSORY 32 und ihre Mutter Aife Aoife ingen Gillapatraic D'IRLANDE 27. Sie hat um 0979 in Schottland, United Kingdom Cornan Abbot geheiratet. Sie starb 1023 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Glamis Castle, Forfarshire, Scotland und wurde in Orkney, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY è nata il il 6 gennaio 0962 nel Diocese of Ossory, Irlanda, sua padre, Donnchad I Mael-na-Mbo Ri na Hy Kinsale D'OSSORY, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Aife Aoife ingen Gillapatraic D'IRLANDE, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Cornan Abbot circa 0979, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1023, nel Glamis Castle, Forfarshire, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Orkney, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORYが0962年1月6日にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ オソリーで生まれた時，父Donnchad I Mael-na-Mbo Ri na Hy Kinsale D'OSSORYは32歳，母Aife Aoife ingen Gillapatraic D'IRLANDEは27歳であった。約0979年にイギリススコットランドでCornan Abbotと結婚した。彼女は1023年にスコットランドForfarshireグラミス カストルで61歳で死去し，スコットランドオルクニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY(이)가 0962년 1월 6일 아일랜드 디오스스 프 오소리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Donnchad I Mael-na-Mbo Ri na Hy Kinsale D'OSSORY(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aife Aoife ingen Gillapatraic D'IRLANDE(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 0979년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Cornan Abbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1023년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 글램이스 카스틀에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 르니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 0962, em Diocese of Ossory, Irlanda, seu pai, Donnchad I Mael-na-Mbo Ri na Hy Kinsale D'OSSORY, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Aife Aoife ingen Gillapatraic D'IRLANDE, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Cornan Abbot aproximadamente 0979, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 1023, em Glamis Castle, Forfarshire, Scotland, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Orkney, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY родилась 6 января 0962 г. в местности диосес оф оссори, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Donnchad I Mael-na-Mbo Ri na Hy Kinsale D'OSSORY было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Aife Aoife ingen Gillapatraic D'IRLANDE, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cornan Abbot около 0979 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1023 г. в местности глэмис кастл, Forfarshire, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности орни, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aelgifu Sigurdsdottir ou Édith des Orcades d'OSSORY nació el 6 de enero de 0962, en Diocese of Ossory, Irlanda, su papá, Donnchad I Mael-na-Mbo Ri na Hy Kinsale D'OSSORY, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Aife Aoife ingen Gillapatraic D'IRLANDE, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Cornan Abbot aproximadamente 0979, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió en 1023, en Glamis Castle, Forfarshire, Scotland, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Orkney, Scotland.
